stale.ariaOutOfDate: Preview out of date — update now
stale.pauseReason.heavy: Live preview is paused — this design takes a while to build.
stale.pauseReason.manualDesign: Live preview is paused — this design starts in manual mode.
toast.renderFailed: That combination of settings didn't work
toast.renderFailedDescription: Open Messages (the bell in the top bar) for details.
toast.heavyRenderPaused: This design takes a while to build ({seconds} s), so live preview is paused — press "Update" after making changes.
settings.hiddenMatches#one: {count} matching setting is in All settings
settings.hiddenMatches#other: {count} matching settings are in All settings
loading.engineOffline: The 3D engine is now available offline
loading.readyOffline: This configurator is ready for offline use
loading.updatingPreview: Updating preview… the previous version is shown until the new model is ready
failure.title: Preview could not be updated
failure.engineFailed: The 3D engine couldn't start — check your connection and try again.
failure.body: Your last working preview is still shown — nothing is lost.
attention.fontFallback: Font needed: {family} — the preview uses a substitute
hint.rotateZoomMouse: Drag to rotate · scroll to zoom
hint.rotateZoomTouch: Drag to rotate · pinch to zoom
picker.title: Choose a design
picker.subtitle: Pick what you want to make.
picker.brokenLink: That link pointed to a design that isn't here — pick one to continue.
export.nextSteps: Next, open it in a slicer or send it to a print service.
export.attentionHint: There are unresolved warnings — the model may differ from the selected settings
quickstart.exportHint: Happy with the preview? Use {export} below.
presets.importErrorEmpty: "{name}" has no parameter sets to import.
presets.empty: No presets yet — set things up the way you like, then save them below.
presets.saveAsNewTitle: Save the current settings as a new preset
presets.importTitle: Import presets from an OpenSCAD parameterSets file
presets.exportTitleReady: Export your saved presets as an OpenSCAD parameterSets file
presets.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently deletes your saved preset “{name}”.
files.fontCardBody: Fonts (.ttf/.otf) become available to this design's font settings.
files.fontCardMissing: This design's selected font “{family}” isn’t loaded — the preview uses a substitute.
files.fontCardImportTitle: Import a font (.ttf, .otf) for this design's font settings
files.svgCardBody: SVG artwork for this design's drawings. Use the design's own "Prepare SVG…" control (Customize tab) to fix common issues automatically, or import a ready file here.
files.dataCardBody: Any other file this design references by name — a data file for surface(), and so on. Stored on-device and re-applied next visit.
files.importTitle: Import a file your design references by name (e.g. a data file for surface())
files.clearAllTitle: Remove all imported files and clear the render cache
files.privacyLine: Files stay on your device — nothing is uploaded.
output.title: Messages from the design — notices & log
help.label: Help
help.installBlurb: Install this configurator for quick, offline access.
licenses.title: Open-source licenses
licenses.intro: This configurator is built with the following open-source components, listed to comply with their licenses.
docmodal.title: About the {label}
docmodal.label: {label} guide
docmodal.loadError: Couldn't load this design's documentation. Check your connection and try again.
dimensions.heading: Dimensions
resetbutton.titleDirty: Reset all parameters to this design's defaults
resetbutton.titleClean: Parameters are already at their defaults
resetbutton.confirmDescription: This discards your current parameter changes for “{label}”.
params.fontMissing: “{family}” isn’t loaded — text may render in another font.
params.nothingToCustomize: This design has nothing to customize.
svg.notSvg: That's not an SVG — choose a .svg file.
svg.tooLarge: That SVG is too large ({size} MB). The limit is 2 MB — simplify the drawing and try again.
svg.dropHint: Drop an SVG here or choose a file to check & fix it for printing.
svg.loadErrorTitle: The SVG editor couldn't be loaded.
svg.loadErrorBody: Check your connection, then reload to try again.
svgwizard.title: Prepare SVG
svgwizard.parseError: This file could not be read as an SVG.
svgwizard.step1Intro: Only shapes are raised into relief — text, colours and a few other things aren't. Here's what to expect from this drawing:
svgwizard.noProblemsCheck: No problems found — this drawing is ready to use.
svgwizard.noProblemsRemain: No problems remain — this drawing is ready to use.
svgwizard.regionsFound: Found {count} colour regions. Each keeps its own colour on export:
svgwizard.unpreviewableSuffix: can't be previewed here, but are still applied — check them when you print.
svgwizard.tooManyRegions: {count} regions is a lot: a few large colour regions print reliably, but many small ones can merge or print unpredictably. Consider fewer, larger regions.
svgwizard.singleColour: This drawing has a single colour, so it comes out as one solid — no per-region colours to set.
svgwizard.blockedError: This drawing can't be used as-is — resolve the errors above (e.g. add some filled shapes), then try again.
svgprep.noViewboxMessage: the drawing has no canvas frame, so its size on the plate can't be judged reliably
svgprep.noViewboxHint: export with a viewBox (most editors do this automatically) so it always scales the same way
svgprep.viewboxOriginMessage: the drawing's canvas doesn't start at the top-left corner, so parts of it can land off the plate (especially with colour regions)
svgprep.viewboxOriginHint: the Fix step re-centres the drawing for you
svgprep.noGeometryMessage: nothing to raise — the drawing has no shapes that can become relief
svgprep.noGeometryHint: draw filled shapes (rectangles, circles, paths); only shapes can be raised, not text or images
svgprep.textMessage: {count} piece(s) of live text — text can't be raised into relief and will disappear
svgprep.textHint: convert the text to outlines in your editor (Inkscape: Object to Path; Illustrator: Create Outlines), or add wording through the design's own label field instead
svgprep.strokeOnlyMessage: {count} outline-only shape(s) (a stroke with no fill) — every shape is raised as a filled shape, so these come out solid instead of as thin outlines
svgprep.strokeOnlyHint: give the shape a fill, or convert its outline to a filled shape (Inkscape: Stroke to Path; Illustrator: Outline Stroke) to keep a thin wall or outline
svgprep.openPathsMessage: {count} unclosed path(s) — an open path may come out as a thin sliver or not at all
svgprep.openPathsHint: close every path in your editor
svgprep.coversCanvasMessage: {count} shape(s) cover the whole canvas — a full-canvas background is raised as one solid block that buries everything on top of it
svgprep.coversCanvasHint: remove the background/artboard rectangle (the Fix step drops it); a tactile relief needs open space around the raised shapes
svgprep.ignoredMessage: {count} <{tag}> element(s) — these aren't supported and won't be raised
svgprep.ignoredHint: flatten or expand them into plain filled shapes if they carry artwork you need
svgprep.styledFillMessage: {count} shape(s) get their colour from a stylesheet, which isn't read here — those regions are treated as black
svgprep.styledFillHint: give each shape a direct fill colour, or a simple class / id / tag colour rule the Fix step can resolve
svgprep.inkscapeTrapMessage: Inkscape layer name(s) won't be matched as colour regions yet: {names}
svgprep.inkscapeTrapHint: the Fix step renames each layer so its name is used as the region, or set an explicit name on the group
svgprep.regionIsLabelMessage: the colour region "{name}" is an Inkscape layer name that won't be matched as-is
svgprep.regionIsLabelHint: the Fix step makes the layer name usable as a region
svgprep.regionMissingMessage: no region named "{name}" in the drawing; available: {available}
svgprep.regionMissingHint: group the shapes for this colour and name the group "{name}" (Inkscape: Object Properties; Illustrator: the layer name)
svgprep.contentOutsideMessage: some artwork sits outside the canvas — it may be cut off
svgprep.contentOutsideHint: move everything inside the canvas frame
svgprep.undersizedMessage: the drawing fills less than half its canvas — it may come out small and, with colour regions, off-centre
svgprep.undersizedHint: draw the artwork out to the edges of the canvas
svgprep.leftLayerAsIs: left layer "{label}" as-is (another region already uses that name)
svgprep.layerUsable: made layer "{label}" usable as a colour region
svgprep.recentred: re-centred the drawing so it sits on the plate
svgprep.stylesheetColours: applied {count} stylesheet colour(s) directly to the shapes
svgprep.removedBackgrounds: removed {count} full-canvas background(s) that would bury the artwork in one solid block
svgprep.alreadyGrouped: every shape is already in a named colour region — nothing to regroup
svgprep.transformBlocked: some shapes are transformed or clipped, so regrouping could move them — group them by colour in your editor instead
svgprep.singleColourOnly: only one colour found — nothing to separate
svgprep.groupedRegion: grouped {count} shape(s) into the "{color}" colour region
notices.bundleStale: This page is running an outdated version. Reload to update.
notices.offline: You're offline — rendering and export still work.
app.installHintToast: Install this configurator for quick, offline access?
app.copyFailed: Couldn't copy — copy the URL from the address bar
shareability.warning: Link copied, but it won't include files only on this device: {names}. Recipients need those too.
panel.livePreviewTitle: Update the preview automatically as you change settings
sheet.handleAria: Parameter panel — {state}. Tap to cycle, Arrow Up/Down to resize
presets.notAParameterSetsFile: Not an OpenSCAD parameterSets file (missing parameterSets).
